basics.name: Vikas Bhatia
basics.title: Software Design Engineer | Full Stack Developer
basics.summary: Hello! I'm Vikas Bhatia, a passionate Full Stack Developer driven by curiosity and a desire to understand technology from a deeper perspective. I enjoy exploring how systems function beneath the surface and continuously push myself to learn, adapt, and innovate. I’m currently working as a Software Design Engineer at Newgen Software, where I continue to refine my expertise in React, Node.js, Express.js, Java, and SQL. My goal is to keep evolving as a developer — combining technical depth with creativity to build solutions that make a real impact.

bullets: Optimized RuleBuilder by implementing multi-level conditional rule engine, enabling users to add complex conditions and actions, and enhancing rule execution efficiency by 30%.
Introduced application-specific rule management, allowing creation and modification of global and local rules.
Developed an Error Boundary in RuleBuilder, enabling automated frontend error capture and backend logging via API, improving system monitoring and accelerating debugging.
Led RuleBuilder migration from CRA to Vite (React 19), delivering 4× faster builds and 15% smaller bundles.
Optimized MSSQL queries and reduced redundant database operations to improve system response time.
Implemented structured logging and error-handling mechanisms, improving debugging and production monitoring.
Designed and implemented user interface of an employment management application resulting in a 60% reduction in workflow complexities.
Performance optimization of website by 30% through the strategic implementation of Next.js with Typescript.
Solely responsible for creating a user-friendly employee management app, managing data efficiently.
Worked closely with a team to create secure online login systems and optimize the management of college competitions.
Took the initiative to organize diverse events aimed at enhancing student awareness in the field of software engineering.

projects.title: LegalBridge
bullets: An Android app to provide centralized legal services and marketplace for Legal Service Providers (LSPs).
Implemented registration/login APIs with complex schemas, OTP verification, JWT authentication, ensuring 99.9% uptime.
Designed and implemented scalable booking APIs for LSP platforms, allowing clients to schedule and track meetings.

projects.title: Bharat-Yojana
bullets: Developed 'Bharat-Yojana' simplifying access to government schemes, increasing user engagement.
Incorporated a Chatbot with the ChatGPT3API into an Android app via WebView, boosting user interactions by 30%.
Introduced real-time notifications with Socket.io, increasing user engagement by 88%.

projects.title: SwiftBuy
bullets: Designed responsive design with the MERN stack, leading to a 30% faster loadtime with Next.js.
Incorporated Admin functionality with payment gateway of Braintree.
Integrated secure user authentication using JWT for reliable user access.

education.institution: Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College, Ghaziabad

awards: Finalist in the 36-hour Smart India Hackathon 2023 (Kolkata) and qualified for the final round of Anveshna 2023.
Student Coordinator at CSI (Computer Society of India); organized and led a React workshop on front-end development, mentoring over 100 junior participants.
Secured Rank 109th/ 10K+ in CodeChef June Long Challenge and advanced to the 3rd round of CodeChef SnackDown.
extra: Loves reading tech articles, exploring new frameworks, and diving into concepts to understand why they work.
